ApiFlow.Name: AF_U-009-Reventillation_Frais
ApiFlow.Description: Reventilation frais au prorata volume ou montant Creation Date: 19/12/2025 Updated Date: 09/01/2026 Version: 1.2

Activity.Name: GetConteneurs
Activity.Description: Obtenir les informations des conteneur depuis la table FAPIBA
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"Infor M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"GET","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/EXPORTMI/Select","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/EXPORTMI","restPath":"/Select","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":[],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"QERY","description":"Query statement(982)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"E7PEXI from FAPIBA where INBN = '${input.headInvoiceNumber}' and PEXN = '412'","path":null},{"name":"SEPC","description":"Separator character or blank for flat file(1)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":";","path":null},{"name":"HDRS","description":"Include headers, 1 or 0 or blank(1)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"number","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"The locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"The time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludeempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"returncols","description":"A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null}],"inputContentType":null,"outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"EXPORTMI_FAPIBA","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: Prepare_GetLignesOA
Activity.Description: Creation json pour appelle API en bulk pour recuperer les lignes OA depuis MPLINE ou UCA1 = No conteneur

Activity.Name: GetPOLines
Activity.Description: Recuperation lignes OA depuis table MPLINE ou UCA1 = No Conteneurs
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"Infor M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"POST","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2","restPath":"/execute","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"Locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"Time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"Position to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"body","description":"Since the request body is processed in a streaming fashion, ordering of attributes must be taken into account - the \"transactions\" attribute must be the last attribute of the request.","type":"BODY","dataType":null,"required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"${Prepare_GetLignesOA.output}","path":null}],"inputContentType":"JSON","outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"EXPORTMI_MPLINE","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: RecuperationErreurMPLINE
Activity.Description: Recuperation des erreur API: No Conteneur non retrouver ou Volume Ligne OA = 0
Activity.JQScript:
# Validate EXPORTMI MPLINE response and create error messages for empty, error, or zero volume records # Input: { request: prepareMPLINESelect request, response: EXPORTMI_MPLINE response } # Output: Array of error messages for queries that failed, returned no records, or have zero volume
.request.transactions as $requests | .response.results as $results |
[ range($results | length) as $idx | $results[$idx] as $result | $requests[$idx] as $request |
# Extract UCA1 (container) from query for error message ($request.record.QERY | match("IBUCA1\\s*=\\s*'([^']+)'").captures[0].string) as $container |
# Check if the result has an errorMessage field if $result.errorMessage != null and $result.errorMessage != "" then { container: $container, errorMessage: "Erreur lors de la recuperation numero lignes OA pour le conteneur: \($container) - \($result.errorMessage)" } # Check if the response has no records elif ($result.records | length) == 0 then { container: $container, errorMessage: "Aucun enregistrement trouvé dans la recuperation numero lignes OA pour le conteneur: \($container)" } else # Check each record for zero volume (4th field in REPL: PUNO;PNLI;PNLS;UDN1) ( $result.records[] | (.REPL | split(";")) as $fields | $fields[0] as $puno | $fields[1] as $pnli | $fields[2] as $pnls | ($fields[3] | tonumber) as $volume |
if $volume == 0 then { Conteneur: $container, PUNO: $puno, PNLI: $pnli, PNLS: $pnls, Message: "Le volume est zéro pour le conteneur: \($container), OA: \($puno), Ligne: \($pnli), Suffixe: \($pnls)" } else empty end ) end ]

Activity.Name: CUSEXTMI_GetFieldValue
Activity.Description: Recuperer le champ CUGEX1 pour les ligne frais dans la facture
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"Infor M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"GET","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/CUSEXTMI/GetFieldValue","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/CUSEXTMI","restPath":"/GetFieldValue","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":[],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"FILE","description":"Table(10)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"MPCELE","path":null},{"name":"PK01","description":"Primary key 1(30)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"${input.costingElem}","path":null},{"name":"PK02","description":"Primary key 2(30)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"PK03","description":"Primary key 3(30)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"PK04","description":"Primary key 4(30)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"PK05","description":"Primary key 5(30)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"PK06","description":"Primary key 6(30)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"PK07","description":"Primary key 7(30)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"PK08","description":"Primary key 8(30)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"The locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"The time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludeempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"returncols","description":"A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null}],"inputContentType":null,"outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"CUSEXTMI_GetFieldValue","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: VerificationErreurAPI
Activity.Description: Verification si erreur recuperation ligne OA

Activity.Name: Prepare_GetMontant
Activity.Description: Recuperation montant de ligne OA dans MPOEXP ou CEID = costing elem

Activity.Name: GetPOMontant
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"Infor M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"POST","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2","restPath":"/execute","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"Locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"Time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"Position to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"body","description":"Since the request body is processed in a streaming fashion, ordering of attributes must be taken into account - the \"transactions\" attribute must be the last attribute of the request.","type":"BODY","dataType":null,"required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"${Prepare_GetMontant.output}","path":null}],"inputContentType":"JSON","outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"EXPORTMI_MPOEXP","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: DelLine
Activity.Description: Appel API EXT451MI DelLine pour supprimer ligne sur APS451

Activity.Name: CalculateProrata
Activity.Description: Calcul du prorata gross price pour l'ajout des lignes sur APS451
Activity.JQScript:
# Calculate prorata of gross price based on CUSEXTMI A030 field: # A030 = "A" -> use Volume from MPLINE (UDN1 field) # A030 = "B" -> use Montant from MPOEXP # Otherwise -> return empty transactions # Input: { CUSEXTMI: CUSEXTMI_GetFieldValue, POMontants: EXPORTMI_MPOEXP, POLines: EXPORTMI_MPLINE, inputGrossPrice, invoicedAmount, invoiceNumber, division, chargeText } # REPL format for MPLINE: PUNO;PNLI;PNLS;UDN1 (volume) # REPL format for MPOEXP: PUNO;PNLI;PNLS;amount
# Get A030 value from CUSEXTMI (.CUSEXTMI.results[0].records[0].A030 // "") as $a030 |
# Get input parameters (.inputGrossPrice | tonumber) as $grossPrice | .invoiceNumber as $inbn | .division as $divi | .chargeText as $chargeText |
# Extract RVQA from POLines (MPLINE) - field index 3 (UDN1) ([.POLines.results[] | .records[] | (.REPL | split(";")[4])]) as $rvqaList |
# Extract records based on A030 value # A030 = "A" -> use MPLINE volume data # A030 = "B" -> use MPOEXP amount data # Otherwise -> empty array ( if $a030 == "A" then # Use MPLINE volume data (PUNO;PNLI;PNLS;UDN1) [.POLines.results[] | .records[] | (.REPL | split(";")) | {PUNO: .[0], PNLI: .[1], PNLS: .[2], amount: (.[3] | tonumber)}] elif $a030 == "B" then # Use MPOEXP amount data [.POMontants.results[] | .records[] | (.REPL | split(";")) | {PUNO: .[0], PNLI: .[1], PNLS: .[2], amount: (.[3] | tonumber)}] else # A030 is neither A nor B [] end ) as $records |
# Calculate the sum of all amounts (use 1 if sum is 0 to avoid division by zero) ([$records[].amount] | add // 0) as $rawSum | (if $rawSum == 0 then 1 else $rawSum end) as $totalSum |
# Create bulk API request for APS450MI.AddLine # Prorata calculation: (individualAmount / totalSum) * grossPrice # If RVQA is not empty or 0, divide GRPR by RVQA # If totalSum was 0, GRPR will be 0 for all lines { program: "APS450MI", transactions: [ range($records | length) as $idx | $records[$idx] | . as $rec | $rvqaList[$idx] as $rvqa | # Calculate base GRPR (if $rawSum == 0 then 0 else (($rec.amount / $totalSum) * $grossPrice) end) as $baseGrpr | # If RVQA is valid (not empty, not null, not 0), divide GRPR by RVQA ( if ($rvqa != null and $rvqa != "" and ($rvqa | tonumber) != 0) then ($baseGrpr / ($rvqa | tonumber)) else $baseGrpr end ) as $finalGrpr | { transaction: "AddLine", record: { INBN: $inbn, RDTP: "5", PUNO: $rec.PUNO, PNLI: $rec.PNLI, PNLS: $rec.PNLS, GRPR: (($finalGrpr * 100000 | round) / 100000 | tostring), DIVI: $divi, IVQA: $rvqa, CHGT: $chargeText } } ] }

Activity.Name: AddInvoiceLines
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"POST","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2","restPath":"/execute","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"Locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"Time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"Position to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"body","description":"Since the request body is processed in a streaming fashion, ordering of attributes must be taken into account - the \"transactions\" attribute must be the last attribute of the request.","type":"BODY","dataType":null,"required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"${CalculateProrata.output}","path":null}],"inputContentType":"JSON","outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"APS450MI_AddLine","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: RecuperationErreurs_AddLine
Activity.Description: Recuperation erreur depuis addition ligne APS451MI
Activity.JQScript:
# Validate APS450MI.AddLine response and create error messages for failed transactions # Input: { request: prepareAPS450MIAddLine, response: APS450MIAddLine } # Output: Array of error messages for transactions that failed
.request.transactions as $requests | .response.results as $results |
[ range($results | length) as $idx | $results[$idx] as $result | $requests[$idx] as $request |
# Extract PO info from request for error message $request.record.PUNO as $puno | $request.record.PNLI as $pnli | $request.record.PNLS as $pnls | $request.record.INBN as $inbn |
# Check if the result has an errorMessage field if $result.errorMessage != null and $result.errorMessage != "" then { PUNO: $puno, PNLI: $pnli, PNLS: $pnls, INBN: $inbn, ErrorMessage: "Erreur lors de l'ajout de ligne facture pour OA: \($puno), Ligne: \($pnli), Suffixe: \($pnls), Lot facture: \($inbn) - \($result.errorMessage)" } # Check if the response has no records (failed transaction) elif ($result.records | length) == 0 then { PUNO: $puno, PNLI: $pnli, PNLS: $pnls, INBN: $inbn, ErrorMessage: "Échec de l'ajout de ligne facture pour OA: \($puno), Ligne: \($pnli), Suffixe: \($pnls), Lot facture: \($inbn)" } else empty end ]

Activity.Name: VerificationErreurAPI_AddLine
Activity.Description: Verification si addition ligne a eu une erreur.
